Emergency Room 
use were (0450, 0451, 0452, 0456, or 0459). 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: HOP_ER_VISITS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Null/missing or 1–XXX 
COMMENT: 
Additional ED revenue centers are found in the inpatient data files — if the ED visit resulted in an IP 
admission at the same facility. 
There are two variables that contain counts of ER visits in different settings: this variable and the 
Inpatient ER (IP_ER_VISITS).
